channel.title: briefUpdatesPoliticsOffshootNL
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from briefUpdatesPoliticsOffshootNL, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: China's AI rise rattles Hollywood
item.description: China's unrelenting efforts to catch the U.S. in AI may have claimed its first significant casualty — Hollywood. Why it matters: Technology good enoug...

item.title: Pentagon-Anthropic battle pushes other AI labs into major dilemma
item.description: As the Pentagon and Anthropic wage an ugly and potentially costly battle, three other leading AI labs are also negotiating with the department — and d...

item.title: Coca-Cola bottler sued by federal agency over work event that excluded men
item.description: A Coca-Cola distributor and bottler is being sued for alleged sexual discrimination over a corporate networking event that excluded men, announced the...

item.title: Europe answers Trump's call on Ukraine
item.description: Data: Kiel Institute ; Note: Converted from euros to USD using the exchange rate as of Feb. 13, 2026; Kavya Beheraj/Axios Four years after Russia's in...

item.title: GOP angst over voter turnout builds as losses pile up
item.description: Republicans are getting crushed in scores of state and local races, raising deep concerns about a deflated base refusing to show up to vote even in th...

item.title: Trump’s Black supporters tout minority gains during White House ceremony
item.description: Wednesday’s Black History Month event marked a continued defense of a president who has made racial grievance a hallmark of his political ascent.

item.title: AIPAC accused of covert campaigning as Democratic support falters
item.description: Democrats in Illinois have accused the American Israel Public Affairs Committee, the powerful pro-Israel organization, of meddling in competitive prim...

item.title: White House taps Jay Bhattacharya, CDC critic, to lead agency for now
item.description: The co-author of the Great Barrington Declaration, which rebuked CDC’s response to the coronavirus pandemic, will oversee the nation’s leading public ...

item.title: Hegseth invited Christian nationalist Doug Wilson to preach at Pentagon
item.description: The self-described “paleo-Confederate” has argued that wives should submit to their husbands, women should be denied the vote and Christian enslavers ...

item.title: Tracking who Trump is appointing to fill key administration roles
item.description: Follow President Trump’s progress filling over 800 positions, among about 1,300 that require Senate confirmation, in this tracker from The Washington ...

item.title: Trump in Iowa tries to shift the conversation back to the economy
item.description: A brief swing through the farm state underscored administration fears about the midterms.

item.title: Americans give Trump low marks on handling of economy as midterms likely to center on affordability
item.description: Sixty-one percent of voters told a CNN poll released Friday that they disapprove of the way Trump is handling the economy.

item.title: Capitol agenda: Trump tests GOP with Fed probe
Tech, Media & Telecom Roundup: Market Talk
item.description: DeepSeek, SoFi and more in the latest Market Talks covering Technology, Media and Telecom.

item.title: Silicon Valley Is Raving About a Made-in-China AI Model
item.description: DeepSeek is called “amazing and impressive” despite working with less-advanced chips.

item.title: Reid Hoffman Raises $24.6 Million for AI Cancer-Research Startup
item.description: The LinkedIn co-founder is starting Manas AI with “The Emperor of All Maladies” author Siddhartha Mukherjee.

item.title: What to Know About China's DeepSeek AI
item.description: The Chinese upstart says it has trained high-performing AI models cheaply, without using the most advanced chips.

item.title: Can an App Replace a Personal Trainer? I Tested Nearly a Dozen to Find Out
item.description: Apps can add flexibility and freshness to your routine. Just try not to get injured.
